records.question: Which answers are associated exactly with question 17?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT answer.answertext FROM answer
WHERE answer.questionid = 17
records.pred_sql: SELECT AnswerText FROM Answer WHERE QuestionID = 17

records.question: What answers to question 13 come from users with IDs at least 2577 and surveys numbered at most 2016?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT answer.answertext FROM answer
WHERE answer.userid >= 2577 AND answer.surveyid <= 2016 AND answer.questionid = 13
records.pred_sql:
SELECT AnswerText
FROM Answer
WHERE QuestionID = 13 
  AND UserID >= 2577 
  AND SurveyID <= 2016

records.question: Which answers come from user 374 for survey 2014 or later and question ID at least 103?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT answer.answertext FROM answer
WHERE answer.userid = 374 AND answer.questionid >= 103 AND answer.surveyid >= 2014
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Answer.AnswerText
FROM Answer
WHERE Answer.UserID = 374
  AND Answer.SurveyID >= 2014
  AND Answer.QuestionID >= 103
